posts.author: Trumpwonbidencheated
posts.title: The thing is, this fucker should've been in prison 39 years ago. Why the fuck is he still in government?

posts.raw_content:
So I met a new neighbor last Sunday. Nice guy. Nice family. Things were going well, we had some common interests and experiences. But lo and behold, he asked me the question, "hey, are you watching the super bowl?" And of course I told him the truth, "no".

You should have seen the genuine look of shock and horror in this man's eyes when I told him that. He looked at me like I had a disease or something.

Shocking reminder that these people still exist and that I used to be one. All things considered, I'm grateful for the outlook that I have in life. And there's no going back for me. In fact I'd rather die than go back to that. 

That is all.
posts.author: kek-is-tan
posts.title: Have you ever had an encounter with a normie that was just an obscene reminder of how it used to be living inside the Matrix and how long you've been out for?
